GeneDef.label: energyshifter
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have archites that are capable of rewriting and editing their owners' genetic code within certain limits, using the body's nutrients as energy.

customEffectDescriptions.li: <color=#8a8ae6>Consumes nutrients</color> as a % of maximum. Dependent on active <color=#8a8ae6>sub-genes</color> and <color=#8a8ae6>energy</color> genes.
Allows to turn <color=#8a8ae6>sub-genes</color> (and <color=#8a8ae6>energy</color> genes) on and off.
